parameters.name: file
parameters.label: File
parameters.description: The path and name of the SVG file to load. File format .svg supported.

parameters.name: reload
parameters.label: Reload
parameters.description: Change from 0 to 1 to force the file to reload, useful when the file changes or did not exist at first.

parameters.name: antialias
parameters.label: Anti-Alias
parameters.description: Sets the level of anti-aliasing in the scene. Setting this to higher values uses more graphics memory.

parameters.name: bgalpha
parameters.label: Background Alpha
parameters.description: Sets the background alpha in the image.

parameters.name: xord
parameters.label: Transform Order
parameters.description: The menu attached to this parameter allows you to specify the order in which the changes to your will take place. Changing the Transform order will change where things go much the same way as going a

parameters.name: rord
parameters.label: Rotate Order
parameters.description: The rotational matrix presented when you click on this option allows you to set the transform order for the 's rotations. As with transform order (above), changing the order in which the 's rotations

parameters.name: tunit
parameters.label: Translate Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction (0-1), Fraction Aspect (0-1 considering aspect ratio).

parameters.name: punit
parameters.label: Pivot Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction (0-1), Fraction Aspect (0-1 considering aspect ratio).

parameters.name: py
parameters.label: Py
parameters.description: The Pivot point edit fields allow you to define the point about which the TOP scales and rotates. Altering the pivot point of a TOP produces different results depending on the transformation performed

parameters.name: rz
parameters.label: Rz
parameters.description: The three fields for Rotate allow you to specify the amount of rotation along any of the three axes.

parameters.name: ty
parameters.label: Ty
parameters.description: The two fields for Translate allows you to specify transforms in x and y axes.

parameters.name: bgcolorb
parameters.label: Bgcolorb
parameters.description: Sets the background color in the image.

parameters.name: sy
parameters.label: Sy
parameters.description: The two fields for Scale allows you to specify transforms in x and y axes.
